channel.title: Kubernetes on Jung Yeon Park
channel.description: Recent content in Kubernetes on Jung Yeon Park

item.title: Kubernetes
item.description: Kubernetes is a container orchestration platform, designed to run containerized workloads in production. Originally, an internal project at Google, Kubernetes (k8s) was donated to CNCF in 2014 and has since become one of the most popular platforms for running containers. Real applications often consist of multiple containers, spread across multiple nodes. Kubernetes gives you a way to manage these containers and deploy them to the end users. Some of its features include:
